description: You are working on a note-taking Android app called NotepadApp at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotepadApp/. The app needs a notification system for note reminders and app updates. Implement a notification infrastructure by creating NotificationHelper.kt at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/notifications/NotificationHelper.kt with channel IDs CHANNEL_REMINDERS ("note_reminders", IMPORTANCE_HIGH) and CHANNEL_UPDATES ("app_updates", IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT). The helper must include a method to create these channels and a method buildReminderNotification that returns a notification using the reminders channel and the android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info icon. Create and register a custom android.app.Application class at app/src/main/java/com/example/notepadapp/NotepadApplication.kt that initializes the notification channels on startup. Update app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to include the POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission and ensure the project builds successfully.
